options.systemMessage: You are a strict marketing brief validator. Always respond with valid JSON only. No extra text.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'rejected', message: 'Your brief is incomplete. Please review the feedback below and resubmit.', feedback: $json.feedback }) }}

additionalFields.columnValues: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: { label: $('Receive Marketing Brief').item.json.body.assetType }, date: { date: $('Receive Marketing Brief').item.json.body.deadline }, long_text: { text: JSON.stringify($('Receive Marketing Brief').item.json.body) } }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'created', message: 'Brief accepted and Monday.com item created successfully.', mondayItemId: $('Create Monday.com Item').item.json.id, projectName: $('Receive Marketing Brief').item.json.body.projectName }) }}
